programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: A trip aboard one of the world's most expensive and sought-after train rides details the journey for both passengers and crew.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: The prairies of Canada; the deserts of Australia; the cold of the Norwegian Arctic Circle; the steepest slopes of the mighty Swiss Alps.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Exploring Vietnam by rail aboard the Reunification Express; a three-day ride from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City rich in views of rivers, rice paddies and dragon fruit orchards; steeped in the nation's war-torn past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Travelling up the coast of New Zealand in style aboard the Coastal Pacific, a train that embodies the nation's spirit of grit and determination; for two years, this ride was shut down due to an earthquake in 2016.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mightiest
programme.desc: Tensions rise as preparations are under way for a first mission; check out the USS Gerald R. Ford, the U.S. Navy's largest aircraft carrier.

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: Just a few minutes after taking off from Bucharest, Tarom's 371 flight plunges into a field and Romanian investigators call the FBI to determine whether it was an accident or an act of murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: After Continental Airlines Flight 1404 careens off the runway and crashes in flames, investigators are left to determine what was to blame.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: While en route to Russia, Aeroflot Nord Flight 821 crashes onto the Trans-Siberian railway when on the final approach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: LaMia Flight 2933 is on its final approach when the crew suddenly declares a fuel emergency.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: When United Express Flight 6291 crashes during its final approach only a mile from the runway, investigators must sift through the charred remains to find out what happened.

programme.title: If We Built It Today
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it; experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
